case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/ TAX COLLECTOR VS. FRANCISCO MORENO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/ TAX COLLECTOR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $60.91) SERVED APR-29-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MORENO, FRANCISCO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,983.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/ TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MORENO, FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-28-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/ TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORENO, FRANCISCO $4,983.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.91 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,043.91, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
